texto: So there were two worlds: the perceived world, a dimension of adjectives, equations and brush strokes, a surface dazzling with our efforts to render it, but ultimately bearing only our own reflections; and the impenetrable world, the plumbless dark full of latent particles, the primordial cauldron which, like a mother, gives us our being but is a lifelong riddle.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bia Lowe: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “So there were two worlds: the perceived world, a dimension of adjectives, equations and brush str…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, art, science pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao-noturna.
